entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

entry.title: Profile
entry.content:
勇者名片

Timeinrain

Timeinrain

从学生项目、实习工程训练到腾讯项目实践，能力主线集中在游戏客户端、引擎渲染、玩法系统、性能定位与工具链落地。

主线方向
游戏客户端 / 引擎
引擎经验
UE / Unity
语言能力
中文、英语、粤语

属性分布

  • 专业技能7/10
  • 沟通协作8/10
  • 创新创造9/10
  • 抗压韧性7/10
  • 学习自驱8/10

能力标签

  • C++工程
  • HLSL
  • 着色器
  • UE4
  • UE5
  • 渲染调试
  • 性能分析
  • 玩法系统
  • UGC玩法
  • 多人联机
  • 工具链
  • 技术美术
  • RHI
  • 移动渲染
  • Unity
  • 原型开发
  • 性能定位
  • 沟通协作
  • 创意实现
  • 学习自驱

entry.title: Tags
entry.content:
Skill Tag Codex

个人能力标签

把简历与经历中的关键词整理成一张像素冒险者的技能索引：主线是游戏客户端、引擎渲染、玩法系统、性能定位与工具链落地。

  • 28Ability Tags
  • 5Core Domains
  • 3Career Chapters
UE / UnityRenderingC++ EngineeringHLSL / ShaderGameplay SystemsPerformance ProfilingRenderDocRHI / MobileUGC GameplayMultiplayerTools PipelineTechnical ArtGAS / AIFairyGUICreativityCollaboration

引擎与渲染

偏底层和画面表现的能力标签，来自工作阶段的渲染、移动端与调试实践。

  • UE4 / UE5
  • Unity
  • HLSL / Shader
  • FFT Ocean
  • SSAO
  • RHI / Mobile Rendering
  • RenderDoc

客户端与玩法

把设计、原型和线上玩法落到可运行系统中的能力标签。

  • C++ Engineering
  • Gameplay Systems
  • UGC Gameplay
  • Multiplayer
  • GAS
  • AI / ORCA
  • Photon Prototype

工具与性能

面向工程效率、性能定位和问题拆解的实践标签。

  • Profiler
  • Memory Analysis
  • FairyGUI
  • Tools Pipeline
  • Automation
  • Mini-game Optimization
  • Project Reading

设计与表达

从数字媒体技术、游戏设计课题和团队项目中沉淀的创意与表达标签。

  • Game Design
  • Level Design
  • Creative Prototyping
  • Technical Art
  • Kinect Interaction
  • Documentation
  • Presentation
Village

学生时代

Game Design / Unity Prototype / UE5 / Kinect / Photon / Technical Art

查看学生时代
Forest Mine

实习阶段

Profiler / FairyGUI / UE4 Client / C++ / GAS / AI / ORCA

查看实习阶段
Demon Castle

工作阶段

Rendering / HLSL / RenderDoc / RHI / Gameplay / UGC / Tools Pipeline

查看工作阶段

冒险者特质

  • Technical Skills7/10
  • Communication & Collaboration8/10
  • Creativity9/10
  • Resilience7/10
  • Learning & Self-Motivation8/10
  • Languages中文 / English / Cantonese

(function () { function createSpark(x, y) { var spark = document.createElement('span'); spark.className = 'pixel-spark'; spark.style.left = x + 'px'; spark.style.top = y + 'px'; document.body.appendChild(spark); window.setTimeout(function () { spark.remove(); }, 700); } document.addEventListener('click', function (event) { if (event.button !== 0) return; createSpark(event.clientX, event.clientY); }, { passive: true }); function drawAdventurerRadar(canvas) { var context = canvas.getContext('2d'); var items = []; var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1; var measuredSize = Math.round(canvas.getBoundingClientRect().width || canvas.clientWidth || 0); var cssSize = Math.min(420, measuredSize || 340); var center = cssSize / 2; var radius = cssSize * (cssSize < 260 ? 0.22 : 0.24); var labelRadius = cssSize * (cssSize < 260 ? 0.34 : 0.36); var total = 0; try { items = JSON.parse(canvas.dataset.adventurerRadar || '[]'); } catch (error) { items = []; } if (!context || !items.length) return; canvas.width = Math.round(cssSize * dpr); canvas.height = Math.round(cssSize * dpr); canvas.style.height = cssSize + 'px'; context.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0); context.clearRect(0, 0, cssSize, cssSize); context.imageSmoothingEnabled = false; context.lineJoin = 'miter'; context.lineCap = 'square'; items.forEach(function (item) { total += Number(item.value) || 0; }); function point(index, valueRadius) { var angle = -Math.PI / 2 + index * Math.PI * 2 / items.length; return { x: center + Math.cos(angle) * valueRadius, y: center + Math.sin(angle) * valueRadius }; } function polygon(points, stroke, fill, lineWidth) { context.beginPath(); points.forEach(function (p, index) { if (index === 0) { context.moveTo(p.x, p.y); } else { context.lineTo(p.x, p.y); } }); context.closePath(); if (fill) { context.fillStyle = fill; context.fill(); } if (stroke) { context.strokeStyle = stroke; context.lineWidth = lineWidth || 2; context.stroke(); } } function drawPixelLabel(text, x, y, align) { var paddingX = 6; var paddingY = 4; var fontSize = cssSize < 240 ? 10 : cssSize < 320 ? 11 : 13; var textWidth; var boxWidth; var boxHeight = fontSize + paddingY * 2 + 2; var boxX; var boxY; context.font = '700 ' + fontSize + 'px "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Microsoft YaHei", monospace'; textWidth = context.measureText(text).width; boxWidth = Math.min(cssSize - 6, Math.ceil(textWidth + paddingX * 2)); boxX = align === 'right' ? x - boxWidth : align === 'center' ? x - boxWidth / 2 : x; boxY = y - boxHeight / 2; boxX = Math.max(3, Math.min(cssSize - boxWidth - 3, boxX)); boxY = Math.max(3, Math.min(cssSize - boxHeight - 3, boxY)); context.fillStyle = 'rgba(44, 27, 10, 0.92)'; context.fillRect(Math.round(boxX), Math.round(boxY), boxWidth, boxHeight); context.textAlign = 'center'; context.textBaseline = 'middle'; context.fillStyle = '#fff0b5'; context.shadowColor = '#050302'; context.shadowOffsetX = 2; context.shadowOffsetY = 2; context.shadowBlur = 0; context.fillText(text, Math.round(boxX + boxWidth / 2), Math.round(boxY + boxHeight / 2 + 1), Math.max(10, boxWidth - paddingX * 2)); context.shadowOffsetX = 0; context.shadowOffsetY = 0; } for (var level = 2; level <= 10; level += 2) { polygon(items.map(function (_, index) { return point(index, radius * level / 10); }), '#8a571b', null, 2); } items.forEach(function (_, index) { var p = point(index, radius); context.beginPath(); context.moveTo(center, center); context.lineTo(p.x, p.y); context.strokeStyle = '#c89543'; context.lineWidth = 2; context.stroke(); }); polygon(items.map(function (item, index) { return point(index, radius * Math.max(0, Math.min(10, Number(item.value) || 0)) / 10); }), '#ffe08a', 'rgba(219, 151, 48, 0.48)', 4); items.forEach(function (item, index) { var p = point(index, radius * Math.max(0, Math.min(10, Number(item.value) || 0)) / 10); var label = point(index, labelRadius); var align = 'center'; context.fillStyle = '#fff0ac'; context.fillRect(p.x - 4, p.y - 4, 8, 8); if (label.x < center - 20) align = 'right'; if (label.x > center + 20) align = 'left'; drawPixelLabel((item.label || '') + ' ' + item.value + '/10', label.x, label.y, align); }); context.fillStyle = '#3a250d'; context.strokeStyle = '#e0a33e'; context.lineWidth = 2; var scoreBoxWidth = Math.min(124, Math.max(92, cssSize * 0.52)); var scoreBoxHeight = Math.min(40, Math.max(30, cssSize * 0.15)); var scoreFontSize = Math.min(17, Math.max(13, cssSize * 0.045)); context.fillRect(center - scoreBoxWidth / 2, center - scoreBoxHeight / 2, scoreBoxWidth, scoreBoxHeight); context.strokeRect(center - scoreBoxWidth / 2, center - scoreBoxHeight / 2, scoreBoxWidth, scoreBoxHeight); context.font = '700 ' + scoreFontSize + 'px "Ark Pixel 12px Proportional SC", "Microsoft YaHei", monospace'; context.textAlign = 'center'; context.textBaseline = 'middle'; context.fillStyle = '#fff2b8'; context.fillText('总评 ' + (total / items.length).toFixed(1) + '/10', center, center + 1, scoreBoxWidth - 8); } function initAdventurerRadar() { var canvases = document.querySelectorAll('.adventurer-radar-canvas[data-adventurer-radar]'); Array.prototype.forEach.call(canvases, drawAdventurerRadar); } function initCareerMap() { var board = document.querySelector('.career-map-board[data-career-map]'); var dataNode = document.getElementById('career-map-data'); if (!board || !dataNode || board.dataset.mapReady === 'true') return; var panel = board.querySelector('.career-map-info'); var closeButton = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-close'); var kickerNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-kicker'); var titleNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-title'); var textNode = board.querySelector('.career-map-info-text'); var widgets = board.querySelectorAll('.career-map-widget[data-map-panel]'); var mapData = {}; var typingTimer = null; var activeKey = ''; try { mapData = JSON.parse(dataNode.textContent || '{}'); } catch (error) { mapData = {}; } if (!panel || !kickerNode || !titleNode || !textNode || !widgets.length) return; board.dataset.mapReady = 'true'; function clearTyping() { if (typingTimer) { window.clearTimeout(typingTimer); typingTimer = null; } panel.classList.remove('is-typing'); } function setWidgetState(key) { Array.prototype.forEach.call(widgets, function (widget) { widget.classList.toggle('is-active', widget.dataset.mapPanel === key); }); } function typeText(text) { var index = 0; var chunkSize = 4; var delay = 12; clearTyping(); textNode.textContent = ''; panel.classList.add('is-typing'); function tick() { index = Math.min(text.length, index + chunkSize); textNode.textContent = text.slice(0, index); if (index < text.length) { typingTimer = window.setTimeout(tick, delay); } else { typingTimer = null; panel.classList.remove('is-typing'); } } tick(); } function activate(key) { var item = mapData[key]; if (!item) return; if (activeKey === key && board.classList.contains('is-open')) return; activeKey = key; board.dataset.active = key; board.classList.add('is-open'); panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); kickerNode.textContent = item.kicker || ''; titleNode.textContent = item.title || ''; setWidgetState(key); typeText(item.text || ''); } function reset() { activeKey = ''; clearTyping(); board.classList.remove('is-open'); board.removeAttribute('data-active'); panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); kickerNode.textContent = ''; titleNode.textContent = ''; textNode.textContent = ''; setWidgetState(''); } Array.prototype.forEach.call(widgets, function (widget) { var key = widget.dataset.mapPanel; widget.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () { activate(key); }); widget.addEventListener('focus', function () { activate(key); }); }); board.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { reset(); }); if (closeButton) { closeButton.addEventListener('click', function (event) { event.preventDefault(); reset(); }); } document.addEventListener('keydown', function (event) { if (event.key === 'Escape') reset(); }); } function initFooterSlimeGame() { var footer = document.getElementById('footer'); if (!footer || footer.dataset.slimeGameReady === 'true') return; footer.dataset.slimeGameReady = 'true'; footer.classList.add('footer-slime-zone'); var playground = document.createElement('div'); playground.className = 'footer-slime-playground'; playground.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Magic monster playground'); playground.innerHTML = [ '
', 'MAGIC HUNT', '0', '
', '
', '
' ].join(''); footer.insertBefore(playground, footer.firstChild); var field = playground.querySelector('.footer-slime-field'); var scoreNode = playground.querySelector('.footer-playground-hud strong'); var wand = document.createElement('div'); var active = false; var monsters = []; var pits = []; var rafId = null; var maintainTimer = null; var castingTimer = null; var score = 0; var mouseX = 0; var mouseY = 0; var minMonsters = 3; var maxMonsters = 5; wand.className = 'footer-magic-cursor'; wand.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); wand.innerHTML = [ '', '', '', '', '', '' ].join(''); document.body.appendChild(wand); function randomBetween(min, max) { return min + Math.random() * (max - min); } function clamp(value, min, max) { return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value)); } function easeOutCubic(t) { return 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3); } function overlaps(a, b) { return a.left < b.right && a.right > b.left && a.top < b.bottom && a.bottom > b.top; } function liveMonsterCount() { return monsters.filter(function (monster) { return !monster.defeated && !monster.escaping; }).length; } function updateWand(event) { mouseX = event.clientX; mouseY = event.clientY; wand.style.left = mouseX + 'px'; wand.style.top = mouseY + 'px'; } function createMonsterNode(type) { var monster = document.createElement('div'); monster.className = 'footer-monster footer-' + type; monster.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); if (type === 'bunny') { monster.innerHTML = [ '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '' ].join(''); } else { monster.innerHTML = [ '', '', '', '', '', '' ].join(''); } return monster; } function createMagicBurst(x, y, type) { for (var index = 0; index < 14; index++) { var particle = document.createElement('span'); var angle = Math.PI * 2 * index / 14 + randomBetween(-0.18, 0.18); var distance = randomBetween(28, 70); particle.className = 'footer-hit-burst ' + (type === 'bunny' ? 'is-bunny-hit' : 'is-slime-hit'); particle.style.left = x + 'px'; particle.style.top = y + 'px'; particle.style.setProperty('--dx', Math.cos(angle) * distance + 'px'); particle.style.setProperty('--dy', Math.sin(angle) * distance + 'px'); field.appendChild(particle); window.setTimeout(function (node) { node.remove(); }, 620, particle); } } function scheduleMaintain(delay) { if (maintainTimer) window.clearTimeout(maintainTimer); maintainTimer = window.setTimeout(function () { maintainTimer = null; maintainMonsters(active); scheduleMaintain(randomBetween(850, 1500)); }, delay || randomBetween(700, 1200)); } function spawnMonster(options) { var footerWidth = footer.clientWidth; var footerHeight = footer.clientHeight; var side = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'right' : 'left'; var type = Math.random() > 0.52 ? 'bunny' : 'slime'; var monsterNode; var monster; var safeTarget = clamp(randomBetween(76, footerWidth - 120), 52, Math.max(52, footerWidth - 116)); options = options || {}; if (footerWidth < 180 || footerHeight < 180 || liveMonsterCount() >= maxMonsters) { return; } if (options.type) type = options.type; if (typeof options.targetX === 'number') { safeTarget = clamp(options.targetX, 70, Math.max(70, footerWidth - 116)); side = safeTarget < footerWidth / 2 ? 'left' : 'right'; } monsterNode = createMonsterNode(type); field.appendChild(monsterNode); monsterNode.classList.add(side === 'left' ? 'from-left' : 'from-right'); monster = { node: monsterNode, type: type, start: performance.now(), duration: options.quick ? randomBetween(1250, 1650) : randomBetween(2300, 3600), startX: side === 'left' ? -110 : footerWidth + 110, endX: safeTarget, groundY: footerHeight - randomBetween(type === 'bunny' ? 112 : 96, type === 'bunny' ? 150 : 128), jump: randomBetween(type === 'bunny' ? 118 : 92, type === 'bunny' ? 168 : 140), defeated: false }; monsters.push(monster); startLoop(); } function maintainMonsters(fillToMax) { var target = fillToMax ? maxMonsters : minMonsters + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2); var guard = 0; while (liveMonsterCount() < target && guard < maxMonsters) { spawnMonster({ quick: fillToMax }); guard += 1; } } function removeMonster(monster) { var index = monsters.indexOf(monster); if (index !== -1) monsters.splice(index, 1); monster.node.remove(); maintainMonsters(active); } function defeatMonster(monster) { var monsterRect; var fieldRect; if (!monster || monster.defeated || monster.escaping) return; monster.defeated = true; monster.node.classList.add('is-defeated'); monsterRect = monster.node.getBoundingClientRect(); fieldRect = field.getBoundingClientRect(); score += 1; scoreNode.textContent = String(score); createMagicBurst(monsterRect.left - fieldRect.left + monsterRect.width / 2, monsterRect.top - fieldRect.top + monsterRect.height / 2, monster.type); wand.classList.add('is-casting'); maintainMonsters(active); window.setTimeout(function () { removeMonster(monster); }, monster.type === 'bunny' ? 720 : 620); } function createMagicPit(event) { var fieldRect = field.getBoundingClientRect(); var pit = document.createElement('span'); var localX = event.clientX - fieldRect.left; var localY = event.clientY - fieldRect.top; var magicPit = { node: pit, expiresAt: performance.now() + 2000 }; pit.className = 'footer-magic-pit'; pit.style.left = localX + 'px'; pit.style.top = localY + 'px'; field.appendChild(pit); pits.push(magicPit); wand.classList.add('is-casting'); if (castingTimer) window.clearTimeout(castingTimer); castingTimer = window.setTimeout(function () { wand.classList.remove('is-casting'); }, 420); window.setTimeout(function () { pit.remove(); pits = pits.filter(function (item) { return item !== magicPit; }); }, 2000); checkMagicHits(); } function checkMagicHits() { if (!pits.length || !monsters.length) return; pits.forEach(function (pit) { var pitRect = pit.node.getBoundingClientRect(); monsters.forEach(function (monster) { if (monster.defeated || monster.escaping) return; if (overlaps(pitRect, monster.node.getBoundingClientRect())) { defeatMonster(monster); } }); }); } function clearExpiredPits(now) { pits = pits.filter(function (pit) { if (pit.expiresAt > now) return true; pit.node.remove(); return false; }); } function escapeMonster(monster) { if (!monster || monster.escaping || monster.defeated) return; monster.escaping = true; monster.node.classList.add('is-escaping'); maintainMonsters(active); window.setTimeout(function () { removeMonster(monster); }, 360); } function moveMonster(monster, now) { var progress = clamp((now - monster.start) / monster.duration, 0, 1); var eased = easeOutCubic(progress); var x = monster.startX + (monster.endX - monster.startX) * eased; var y = monster.groundY - Math.sin(progress * Math.PI) * monster.jump; monster.node.style.transform = 'translate(' + x + 'px, ' + y + 'px)'; if (progress >= 1) { escapeMonster(monster); } } function loop(now) { rafId = null; clearExpiredPits(now); monsters.forEach(function (monster) { if (!monster.defeated && !monster.escaping) moveMonster(monster, now); }); checkMagicHits(); if (monsters.length || pits.length || active) startLoop(); } function startLoop() { if (!rafId) rafId = window.requestAnimationFrame(loop); } footer.addEventListener('mouseenter', function (event) { var footerRect = footer.getBoundingClientRect(); active = true; footer.classList.add('is-magic-zone'); wand.classList.add('is-visible'); updateWand(event); maintainMonsters(true); if (liveMonsterCount() < maxMonsters) { spawnMonster({ quick: true, targetX: event.clientX - footerRect.left + randomBetween(-120, 120) }); } startLoop(); }); footer.addEventListener('mousemove', function (event) { if (!active) return; updateWand(event); }); footer.addEventListener('click', function (event) { if (!active) return; event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); updateWand(event); createMagicPit(event); }); footer.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () { active = false; footer.classList.remove('is-magic-zone'); wand.classList.remove('is-visible', 'is-casting'); }); document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () { if (document.hidden && maintainTimer) { window.clearTimeout(maintainTimer); maintainTimer = null; } else if (!document.hidden && !maintainTimer) { maintainMonsters(false); scheduleMaintain(700); } }); maintainMonsters(false); scheduleMaintain(900); startLoop(); } function saveTheme(mode) { var expiry = Date.now() + 2 * 86400000; if (window.btf && window.btf.saveToLocal && typeof window.btf.saveToLocal.set === 'function') { window.btf.saveToLocal.set('theme', mode, 2); return; } try { localStorage.setItem('theme', JSON.stringify({ value: mode, expiry: expiry })); } catch (error) { // Local storage can be unavailable in private or restricted contexts. } } function notifyThemeChange(mode) { var themeChange = window.globalFn && window.globalFn.themeChange; if (!themeChange) return; Object.keys(themeChange).forEach(function (key) { if (typeof themeChange[key] === 'function') { themeChange[key](mode); } }); } function setTheme(mode) { var metaThemeColor = document.querySelector('meta[name="theme-color"]'); if (window.btf && mode === 'dark' && typeof window.btf.activateDarkMode === 'function') { window.btf.activateDarkMode(); } else if (window.btf && mode === 'light' && typeof window.btf.activateLightMode === 'function') { window.btf.activateLightMode(); } else { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', mode); } saveTheme(mode); if (metaThemeColor) { metaThemeColor.setAttribute('content', mode === 'dark' ? '#0d1110' : '#211a13'); } notifyThemeChange(mode); } function initRightsideControls() { var rightside = document.getElementById('rightside'); if (!rightside || rightside.dataset.pixelControlsReady === 'true') return; rightside.dataset.pixelControlsReady = 'true'; rightside.addEventListener('click', function (event) { var target = event.target.closest('#darkmode, #go-up, #rightside-config'); var hideLayout; var mode; if (!target || !rightside.contains(target)) return; event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); if (target.id === 'darkmode') { mode = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? font-family: var(--pixel-readable-en) !important; font-size: 0.94rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-align: right; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.76);}/* Dark-panel contrast guard: the global article heading color is tuned for parchment cards, so RPG/map panels need explicit high-contrast overrides. */#article-container .adventure-map-page .map-hero h1,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-hero h1,#article-container .map-redirect-page .map-redirect-card h1,#article-container .career-map-info-title,#article-container .career-stage-page .quest-card h2,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-side-card h2,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-stat-column h1,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-talent-card h2,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-skill-card h2 { color: var(--pixel-dark-title) !important; border-bottom-color: rgba(255, 230, 148, 0.5) !important; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #050302, -2px 0 0 #3d240d, 0 2px 0 #3d240d, 0 0 16px rgba(255, 214, 111, 0.42) !important;}#article-container .adventure-map-page .map-hero h1,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-hero h1,#article-container .map-redirect-page .map-redirect-card h1,#article-container .career-map-info-title { border: 0 !important;}#article-container .adventure-map-page .map-hero h1::before,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-hero h1::before,#article-container .map-redirect-page .map-redirect-card h1::before,#article-container .career-map-info-title::before,#article-container .career-stage-page .quest-card h2::before,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-side-card h2::before,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-stat-column h1::before,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-talent-card h2::before,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-skill-card h2::before { display: none !important; content: none !important;}#article-container .adventure-map-page .map-kicker,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-kicker,#article-container .map-redirect-page .map-kicker,#article-container .career-map-info-kicker { color: var(--pixel-dark-kicker) !important; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.82) !important;}#article-container .adventure-map-page .map-intro,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-hero p,#article-container .career-stage-page .quest-card p,#article-container .map-redirect-page .map-redirect-card p,#article-container .career-map-info-text,#article-container .rpg-profile-card p,#article-container .rpg-profile-card dd { color: var(--pixel-dark-text) !important; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.68) !important;}#article-container .career-stage-page .quest-list span,#article-container .career-stage-page .stage-side-card p,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-name-subtitle,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-talent-card span,#article-container .rpg-profile-card .rpg-stats dt { color: var(--pixel-dark-muted) !important;}#article-container .career-stage-page a:not(.stage-back-link):not(.headerlink),#article-container .map-redirect-page a:not(.map-redirect-link):not(.headerlink),#article-container .adventure-map-page .career-map-info a:not(.headerlink),#article-container .rpg-profile-card a:not(.headerlink) { color: var(--pixel-dark-link) !important; border-bottom-color: rgba(158, 231, 255, 0.72) !important; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 58%, rgba(158, 231, 255, 0.18) 58% 86%, transparent 86%) !important; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.78) !important;}@media (max-width: 1280px) { #article-container .adventurer-radar-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .adventurer-radar-canvas { width: min(100%, 380px); } #article-container .adventurer-score-list { width: min(100%, 520px); justify-self: center; } #article-container .adventurer-score-list span { overflow: visible; text-overflow: clip; white-space: normal; }}@media (max-width: 900px) { #article-container .adventurer-card-header, #article-container .adventurer-card-grid, .rpg-profile-grid, .stage-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .adventurer-card-header { align-items: center; text-align: center; } #article-container .adventurer-card-grid { grid-template-areas: "profile" "portrait" "radar" "tags"; } #article-container .adventurer-card-mark { justify-self: center; } #article-container .adventurer-radar-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .profile-tag-groups, #article-container .profile-tag-paths { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .profile-tag-soft-skills li { width: 100%; } .rpg-profile-grid { grid-template-areas: "portrait" "stats" "talent" "skills"; } .rpg-portrait-card { min-height: 320px; } .rpg-skill-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } .stage-side-card { position: static; }}@media (max-width: 560px) { #article-container .adventurer-card { padding: 1rem; } #article-container .adventurer-radar-canvas { width: min(100%, 320px); } #article-container .adventurer-stats div { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .adventurer-tag-list { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } #article-container .profile-tags-hero::after { opacity: 0.32; } #article-container .profile-tag-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .profile-tag-cloud .tag-rune { flex: 1 1 calc(50% - 0.5rem); min-width: 0; } #article-container .profile-tag-soft-skills li { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } #article-container .profile-tag-soft-skills span { text-align: left; } .rpg-resource-bar { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: left; } .rpg-card-header { grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; } .rpg-class-badge { grid-column: 1 / -1; width: max-content; } .rpg-skill-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .quest-list span { float: none; display: block; margin-top: 0.18rem; }}

entry.title: Adventure Map
entry.content:
Career Quest

Adventure Map

勇者的冒险经历

学生时代实习阶段工作阶段

点击地图上的区域进入对应经历篇章；悬浮时会展开快速打字机提示。

entry.title: 学生时代
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Village of First Quests

学生时代 · 冒险镇的第一批任务

这段时期的关键词是“快速试作”和“从想法到可玩的落地”：Unity、UE5、Kinect、Photon、技术美术和团队协作都从这里开始成型。

学生时代

2018.09 - 2022.06

UnityUE5PhotonKinectGameplayToonShader

厦门大学

数字媒体技术本科，专业排名 17/69，GPA 3.38。课程包括游戏设计导论、计算机图形学、游戏关卡设计、网络游戏设计。

在校期间参与游戏比赛和课程项目，强调代码能力、软件上手速度、个人表达、审美与团队配合。

代表项目

《蜀道行》2021.11 - 2022.05

UE5 毕设，主程 / TA。负责相机逻辑、机关陷阱、传送阵、可拾取物、怪物巡逻、死亡重生、屏幕变暗后处理等。

《Seizer》2021.08

72 小时单人 ARPG 项目，负责玩法设计、怪物动画状态、生成逻辑、传送门、昼夜系统、判定、燃烧/激光表现、水面与 ToonShader。

《Mochi War》2021.04 - 2021.06

多人联机派对游戏，担任主程与主策。负责 Photon 框架、UI 逻辑、游戏流程逻辑和场景效果调整，并带队获得比赛初赛第一名。

《Connection》2020.09 - 2020.12

负责 Unity 天气系统光照模拟、小镇拟真、泡泡跟随变色、Kinect 骨骼追踪和后处理效果。

社团与组织

厦门大学游戏研发协会创始人 / 管理层，组织游戏制作分享、活动联动与研发交流；也曾参加吉他社巡演活动。

entry.title: 实习阶段
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Forest Mine Trial

实习阶段 · 森林矿谷的工程试炼

这一阶段像进入矿谷打磨工具：从小功能优化、性能定位，到 UE4 客户端工程实践，重点是理解成熟项目并把问题拆成可验证的工程任务。

实习阶段

2020.07 - 2021.09

UE4 GASC++AIProfilerFairyGUIORCA

福州境界信息

2020.07 - 2020.08｜实习游戏程序

负责小游戏功能优化与算法思路优化，包括 isometric 视角遮挡关系拓扑排序、单例模式、有限状态机原型和具体算法实现。

盛趣信息技术（上海）

2021.01 - 2021.04｜性能优化实习生

阅读《Don't Starve: New Home》工程项目，通过 Profiler 定位性能消耗点；分析 FairyGUI 在 Unity 中 AB 包加载卸载对内存的影响；尝试定位内存泄漏，并用动画状态机图结构保存近结点、卸载远结点来优化动画占用。

腾讯天美实习

2021.06 - 2021.09｜游戏客户端程序

学习 UE4 GAS、AI 系统以及 C++ 与 UE4 的联合开发；复现《Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance》底层避障论文，把论文能力转化为可运行的工程验证。

entry.title: 工作阶段
entry.content:
Back to Adventure Map

Demon Castle Campaign

工作阶段 · 魔王城堡的线上战役

工作阶段更像多人副本：既要接线上系统，也要深入引擎渲染、工具链和性能调试。主要方向覆盖游戏客户端、引擎开发、Gameplay、UGC 与移动端适配。

工作阶段

2022.08 - Now

C++HLSLRenderDocRHISSAOUGCGameplay

ZERO Game

2022.08 - 2023.12｜腾讯天美工作室群 · 游戏引擎开发

参与废土风日式冷兵器动作游戏。主要开发内容包括 FFT 海水 Meshing、Shading Model 定制、Projected Grid、SSAO 优化、后处理体积与场景组件关联变化、双端双 Pass 渲染支持、移动端后处理、草地植被 ShadingModels、美术材质工具，以及部分 Gameplay 接入。

元梦之星

2023.12 - 2024.06｜游戏客户端开发

负责涂鸦派对手游 UGC 副玩法移植，将副玩法内容接入 UGC 框架，实现 UGC 模式下副玩法兼容与支持，迁移道具生成器、UGC 掉落物和相关功能。

PartyGame 品类

2024.06 - 2025.09｜腾讯光子工作室群 · 客户端开发

参与多人联机派对项目，负责玩法、系统和工具链相关内容：物理交互物件、地图系统、背包、多端物理真实与背包功能、机型适配、自动化客户端测试机器人、跑图效能工具、协同 NPC、引擎升级流水线、搜打撤玩法基建、家园玩法交互、独立箱庭关卡、红点系统和网页拉起移动端链接平台。

养成类小游戏

2025.11 - 至今｜与朋友合伙开发

负责简单三消合成以及系统设计与实现，继续积累独立玩法原型和轻量化产品闭环经验。

:root { --hijiki-ink: #120c08; --hijiki-panel: rgba(31, 19, 13, 0.9); --hijiki-panel-soft: rgba(66, 39, 21, 0.86); --hijiki-gold: #e5bd67; --hijiki-gold-bright: #fff1b7; --hijiki-red: #b94d39; --hijiki-mint: #bdeacb;}.live2d-kanban { --kanban-width: 282px; --kanban-height: 390px; position: fixed; left: clamp(10px, 2.6vw, 34px); right: auto; bottom: clamp(18px, 4.8vh, 56px); z-index: 1200; width: var(--kanban-width); height: var(--kanban-height); color: var(--hijiki-gold-bright); font-family: var(--pixel-font, "Microsoft YaHei", monospace); letter-spacing: 0; pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban.is-dragging { user-select: none;}.live2d-kanban *,.live2d-kanban *::before,.live2d-kanban *::after { box-sizing: border-box;}.live2d-kanban button { padding: 0; border: 0; font: inherit; letter-spacing: 0;}.live2d-kanban.is-hidden { display: none;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized { width: 44px; height: 44px; overflow: visible;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-hopping { transition: left 420ms cubic-bezier(0.24, 1.42, 0.42, 1), top 420ms cubic-bezier(0.24, 1.42, 0.42, 1);}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::before,.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::after { position: absolute; display: block; pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::before { content: ""; left: 23px; bottom: 35px; z-index: 7; width: 8px; height: 7px; background: #2a190c; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 20% 100%); animation: live2d-cat-meow-pop 1600ms steps(4, end) both;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::after { content: "\55b5\00007e"; left: 28px; bottom: 39px; z-index: 8; min-width: 38px; padding: 5px 8px 6px; color: #fff2be; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(63, 37, 18, 0.96), rgba(24, 15, 10, 0.96)); border: 2px solid rgba(229, 189, 103, 0.88); box-shadow: 0 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(97, 57, 25, 0.72); animation: live2d-cat-meow-pop 1600ms steps(4, end) both;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized .live2d-kanban__bubble,.live2d-kanban.is-minimized .live2d-kanban__controls,.live2d-kanban.is-minimized .live2d-kanban__stage { display: none; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: none; pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban:not(.is-minimized) .live2d-kanban__restore { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban__bubble { position: absolute; left: 0; right: auto; bottom: calc(var(--kanban-height) - 44px); z-index: 5; width: min(244px, calc(100vw - 22px)); min-height: 46px; padding: 9px 13px 10px; color: #fff2be; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.68); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(63, 37, 18, 0.96), rgba(24, 15, 10, 0.96)); border: 2px solid rgba(229, 189, 103, 0.88); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(97, 57, 25, 0.72); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transform: translateY(8px); transition: opacity 180ms steps(4, end), transform 180ms steps(4, end), visibility 180ms; pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban__bubble::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 44px; right: auto; bottom: -10px; width: 18px; height: 10px; background: #2a190c; clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 52% 100%);}.live2d-kanban.is-talking .live2d-kanban__bubble,.live2d-kanban.is-error .live2d-kanban__bubble { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: translateY(0);}.live2d-kanban__controls { position: absolute; left: 8px; right: auto; bottom: calc(var(--kanban-height) - 98px); z-index: 6; display: flex; gap: 7px; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); transition: opacity 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; pointer-events: auto;}.live2d-kanban:hover .live2d-kanban__controls,.live2d-kanban:focus-within .live2d-kanban__controls { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0);}.live2d-kanban__button { position: relative; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(73, 43, 20, 0.98), rgba(24, 15, 9, 0.98)); border: 2px solid rgba(229, 189, 103, 0.9); box-shadow: 0 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.42), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(103, 58, 24, 0.65);}.live2d-kanban__button { width: 28px; height: 28px;}.live2d-kanban__button:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(105, 62, 26, 0.98), rgba(39, 24, 13, 0.98));}.live2d-kanban__button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--hijiki-gold-bright); outline-offset: 3px;}.live2d-kanban__button::before,.live2d-kanban__button::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 7px; right: 7px; top: 12px; height: 3px; background: var(--hijiki-gold-bright); box-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #070403;}.live2d-kanban__button[data-kanban-action="minimize"]::after { display: none;}.live2d-kanban__stage { position: absolute; right: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 1; width: var(--kanban-width); height: calc(var(--kanban-height) - 28px); cursor: grab; pointer-events: auto; touch-action: none; transition: opacity 180ms ease, visibility 180ms ease;}.live2d-kanban.is-dragging .live2d-kanban__stage,.live2d-kanban.is-dragging .live2d-kanban__restore { cursor: grabbing;}.live2d-kanban__stage::before { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 40px; bottom: 30px; width: 216px; height: 54px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48) 0 56%, transparent 58%); filter: blur(1px);}.live2d-kanban__canvas-wrap { position: absolute; inset: 0; overflow: hidden;}.live2d-kanban__canvas-wrap::after { display: none; content: none;}.live2d-kanban__canvas { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; image-rendering: auto;}.live2d-kanban__loading { position: absolute; left: 54px; right: auto; bottom: 116px; z-index: 2; width: 150px; padding: 8px 12px; color: var(--hijiki-gold-bright); font-family: var(--pixel-font-en, monospace); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; text-align: center; text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.72); background: var(--hijiki-panel); border: 2px solid rgba(229, 189, 103, 0.76); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34), inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(97, 57, 25, 0.62); pointer-events: none;}.live2d-kanban:not(.is-loading) .live2d-kanban__loading { display: none;}.live2d-kanban__restore { position: absolute; left: 6px; right: auto; bottom: 6px; z-index: 6; display: block; width: 32px; height: 32px; min-width: 0; min-height: 0; margin: 0; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; color: transparent; line-height: 0; background: transparent url("/img/kanban/pixel-cat-head.svg") center / 32px 32px no-repeat !important; border: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; box-shadow: none !important; outline: 0; appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none; image-rendering: pixelated; transition: opacity 160ms ease, visibility 160ms ease; pointer-events: auto; touch-action: none;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized .live2d-kanban__restore { cursor: grab;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized:not(.is-hopping):not(.is-dragging) .live2d-kanban__restore { animation: live2d-cat-breathe 1180ms steps(3, end) infinite; transform-origin: center bottom;}.live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-hopping .live2d-kanban__restore { animation: live2d-cat-hop 420ms steps(3, end);}.live2d-kanban.is-dragging .live2d-kanban__restore,.live2d-kanban.is-dragging .live2d-kanban__restore:hover { background: transparent url("/img/kanban/pixel-cat-head-drag.svg") center / 32px 32px no-repeat !important; filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34));}.live2d-kanban__restore:hover { background: transparent url("/img/kanban/pixel-cat-head.svg") center / 32px 32px no-repeat !important; border: 0 !important; box-shadow: none !important; filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3));}.live2d-kanban__restore:focus-visible { outline: 0; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(255, 241, 183, 0.78));}.live2d-kanban__restore::before { display: none; content: none;}.live2d-kanban__restore::after { display: none; content: none;}@keyframes live2d-cat-breathe { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)); } 34% { transform: translateY(-1px) scaleX(1.08) scaleY(0.95); filter: drop-shadow(0 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24)); } 68% { transform: translateY(-3px) scaleX(0.94) scaleY(1.12); filter: drop-shadow(0 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18)); }}@keyframes live2d-cat-hop { 0% { transform: translateY(0); } 34% { transform: translateY(-5px); } 68% { transform: translateY(2px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0); }}@keyframes live2d-cat-meow-pop { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.92); } 18%, 78% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }}@media (max-width: 760px) { .live2d-kanban { --kanban-width: 226px; --kanban-height: 324px; left: 10px; right: auto; bottom: 72px; } .live2d-kanban__bubble { bottom: calc(var(--kanban-height) - 34px); width: min(218px, calc(100vw - 20px)); font-size: 13px; } .live2d-kanban__controls { bottom: calc(var(--kanban-height) - 78px); } .live2d-kanban__canvas-wrap::after { right: 7px; width: 204px; }}@media (max-width: 420px) { .live2d-kanban { --kanban-width: 204px; --kanban-height: 298px; left: 4px; right: auto; }}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-hopping, .live2d-kanban__bubble, .live2d-kanban__controls, .live2d-kanban__stage, .live2d-kanban__restore { transition: none !important; } .live2d-kanban.is-minimized .live2d-kanban__restore { animation: none !important; } .live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::before, .live2d-kanban.is-minimized.is-meowing::after { animation: none !important;
